Alex Johnson
alex.johnson@gmail.com | 07700 900456 | Manchester, UK

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Software engineer with 6 years of experience building web applications and backend
services. Skilled in Python, JavaScript, and AWS. Delivered projects on time and
improved team productivity.

WORK EXPERIENCE

Senior Software Engineer — FinTech Solutions Ltd, Manchester
February 2021 – Present
- Led a team to redesign the payment processing service
- Built REST APIs with FastAPI and deployed on AWS Lambda
- Reduced infrastructure costs by optimising cloud resource usage
- Improved test coverage across the codebase
- Mentored two junior developers and conducted regular code reviews
- Collaborated with product and design teams to deliver quarterly releases

Software Engineer — Digital Agency Ltd, Leeds
June 2018 – January 2021
- Developed full-stack features for client web applications using React and Django
- Integrated third-party payment providers including Stripe and PayPal
- Set up CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and Docker
- Fixed performance bottlenecks and improved application response times
- Participated in client meetings and requirements gathering sessions

EDUCATION
Bachelor of Engineering (Software Engineering)
University of Leeds, Graduated 2018

TECHNICAL SKILLS
Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Django, FastAPI, Node.js, PostgreSQL, MySQL,
Redis, AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS), Docker, Kubernetes, Git, Jenkins, REST APIs,
